error_map.hint: linear api_key/access_token is missing or invalid; re-run pm credentials add linear
linear rate limit exceeded; the connector will retry with backoff

graphql.document: query ListLinearIssues($first: Int!, $after: String) { issues(first: $first, after: $after, orderBy: updatedAt) { nodes { id identifier title description priority estimate url branchName createdAt updatedAt completedAt canceledAt state { id name type } team { id key name } assignee { id name email } creator { id name email } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }
query ListLinearTeams($first: Int!, $after: String) { teams(first: $first, after: $after) { nodes { id key name description private createdAt updatedAt } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }

query ListLinearProjects($first: Int!, $after: String) { projects(first: $first, after: $after) { nodes { id name description state progress url createdAt updatedAt startedAt completedAt canceledAt } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }
query ListLinearUsers($first: Int!, $after: String) { users(first: $first, after: $after) { nodes { id name displayName email active admin createdAt updatedAt } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }

query ViewLinearIssue($id: String!) { issue(id: $id) { id identifier title description priority estimate url branchName createdAt updatedAt completedAt canceledAt state { id name type } team { id key name } assignee { id name email } creator { id name email } } }
query ViewLinearTeam($id: String!) { team(id: $id) { id key name description private createdAt updatedAt } }
query ViewLinearProject($id: String!) { project(id: $id) { id name description state progress url createdAt updatedAt startedAt completedAt canceledAt } }
query ViewLinearUser($id: String!) { user(id: $id) { id name displayName email active admin createdAt updatedAt } }

query authenticationSessions {
  authenticationSessions {
    ...AuthenticationSessionResponse
  }
}
    fragment AuthenticationSessionResponse on AuthenticationSessionResponse {
  __typename
  client
  countryCodes
  updatedAt
  detailedName
  location
  ip
  locationCity
  locationCountryCode
  locationCountry
  locationRegionCode
  name
  operatingSystem
  service
  userAgent
  createdAt
  type
  browserType
  lastActiveAt
  isCurrentSession
  id
}

query customView($id: String!) {
  customView(id: $id) {
    ...CustomView
  }
}
    fragment CustomView on CustomView {
  __typename
  viewPreferencesValues {

  slugId

  projectFilterData
  color

  filters

  filterData
  team {
    id

  archivedAt
  createdAt
  id
  updatedBy {
    id
  }
  creator {
    id
  }
  owner {
    id
  }
  organizationViewPreferences {
    ...ViewPreferences
  }
  shared
}

query customViews($after: String, $before: String, $filter: CustomViewFilter, $first: Int, $includeArchived: Boolean, $last: Int, $orderBy: PaginationOrderBy, $sort: [CustomViewSortInput!]) {
  customViews(
    after: $after
    before: $before
    filter: $filter
    first: $first
    includeArchived: $includeArchived
    last: $last
    orderBy: $orderBy
    sort: $sort
  ) {
    ...CustomViewConnection
  }
}
    fragment CustomView on CustomView {
  __typename
  viewPreferencesValues {
    ...ViewPreferencesValues
  }
  userViewPreferences {
    ...ViewPreferences
  }
  slugId
  description
  modelName
  feedItemFilterData
  initiativeFilterData
  projectFilterData
  color
  icon
  updatedAt
  filters
  name
  filterData
  team {
    id
  }
  archivedAt
  createdAt
  id
  updatedBy {
    id
  }
  creator {
    id
  }
  owner {
    id
  }
  organizationViewPreferences {
    ...ViewPreferences
  }
  shared
}

fragment CustomViewConnection on CustomViewConnection {
  __typename
  nodes {
    ...CustomView
  }
  pageInfo {
    ...PageInfo
  }
}
fragment PageInfo on PageInfo {
  __typename
  startCursor
  endCursor
  hasPreviousPage
  hasNextPage
}

query cycle($id: String!) {
  cycle(id: $id) {
    ...Cycle
  }
}
    fragment Cycle on Cycle {

  number

  startsAt

    id
  }
  autoArchivedAt
  archivedAt
  createdAt
  scopeHistory
  issueCountHistory
  id
  isFuture
  isActive
  isPast
  isPrevious
  isNext
}
